message:
Running command: # The old ODB chain propagated the port. The --from resume reuses the netlist from the last 
# successful step in the chain, NOT from synthesis.
# Solution: patch ALL intermediate netlist copies that have the port
# Find all netlist copies in the run dir that have the port
find /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/ \
    -name "*.nl.v" 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -l "reset_n_pad_a_esd_0_h" 2>/dev/null
